title: fix: use actual Pollinations logo in official badge
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: A proper badge of honor
gist.blurb: We've updated the official Pollinations app submission badge to feature our actual logo instead of a placeholder. Wear it with pride!
gist.summary: Updated the tier app submission template to use the official Pollinations logo in the shields.io badge.
gist.impact: Community members submitting apps will now see the correct Pollinations logo on their official badges.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee proudly polishing or wearing a shiny new pixel-art badge, replacing a boring blank white circle. Represents the branding update to the community app submission badge.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot proudly polishing a shiny new digital badge, having just tossed away a plain white circle badge. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
